title: Soul Calibur
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Fighting game.

A lone martial artist or duelist silhouette in an arena or duel space with energy and crowd suggestion kept abstract, holding a pre-impact combat stance under dramatic light.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second

Style:
- Dreamcast aesthetic, clean futurist rendering, bright accent light, airy composition, and modern arcade clarity
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- charged, focused, dramatic

Composition:
- single fighter, clear pose, readable stance, background secondary
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark

Important - do NOT include: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid roster character likeness, avoid franchise costumes, avoid signature weapons or hairstyles. No copyrighted characters, no logos, no recognizable IP.
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid roster character likeness, avoid franchise costumes, avoid signature weapons or hairstyles
revised_prompt: Create an image inspired by a retro Fighting game. The scene should contain a solitary martial artist viewed as a bold silhouette in an abstract duel space, filled with the energy and indistinct suggestion of a crowd. The character is holding a pre-impact combat stance under dramatic lighting. Use a clean, futurist rendering style reminiscent of the Dreamcast aesthetic with bright accents, airy composition, and the clear visuals of a modern arcade game. It may have pixel art or stylized rendering, exhibiting a modern interpretation of retro limitations with a limited color palette if appropriate. The mood of the image should be charged, focused, and dramatic. The composition consists of a single fighter, holding a clear and instantly readable combat pose, with the background taking a secondary role to emphasize simplicity and avoid clutter. The resulting image should be high in clarity with strong contrast, minimal noise, no text, no watermark, and originality while evoking the unique atmosphere of the retro fighting game genre. Avoid replicating any official characters, logos, designs, game assets, costumes, or weapons and do not feature any copyrighted characters or recognizable IP.
